notes:
## Vesper 0.1.1

## What's Changed

- fix: make permission tests cross-platform
- fix: run release npm commands through node
- feat: improve memory recall and product showcase
- feat: add Electron desktop releases and auto updates
- fix: preserve agent tool results during redaction
- fix(providers): P3 import Codex and Claude configuration files
- feat(providers): P2 add Codex and Claude auto-detection UI
- feat(providers): P1 expose Codex and add discovery import API
- feat(providers): P0 add local Codex and Claude discovery service
- feat(ui): P2 productivity upgrades - command palette and density setting
- feat(ui): P1 layout upgrades - slim header, flex-based surface, global status bar
- feat(ui): P0 layout upgrades - chat session rail, collapsible sidebar, adaptive grid columns
- feat: add zero-config web search plugin
- fix: harden scheduled channel notifications
- feat: add connected workflow graph execution
- docs: refresh Vesper documentation
- feat: implement workflow runtime and editor
- refactor: adopt React Router and i18next
- feat: add structured MCP management tools
- fix: preserve agent runs and redact session secrets
- feat(runtime): add native MCP and skills integration
- feat(chat): improve agent activity feedback
- fix(agent): harden goal and subagent orchestration
- feat(agent): add goal mode and native subagents
- feat(i18n): add persistent Chinese and English UI
- feat(memory): 美化星忆星图——银河核心、曲线渐变连线、视差与聚焦模式
- fix: show focused session actions menu
- feat: add focused session actions menu
- feat: remove sessions directly from tiled view
- feat(memory): 打造动态星忆星图
- feat: support pasting images into chat
- fix: make new session creation reliable
- style: strengthen selected chip contrast
- style: refine monochrome theme with restrained blue accents
- style: simplify light theme and replace yellow accent
- refactor(chat): 重绘 Agent 状态精灵
- feat(chat): 增加可交互的 Agent 状态头像
- fix(sidebar): 将最近会话改为独立分区
- refactor(chat): 将历史会话移入侧边栏并新增完整历史页
- fix(chat): 收敛对话布局并将 composer 工具栏改为纯图标
- fix(chat): 历史栏默认收起为窄轨 + 平铺网格高度与滚动修复
- refine(ui): 对话页向概念图看齐——agent 卡片化、大发送按钮、三点金脉冲
- docs: 标记 UI 重塑方案为已执行并记录偏差说明
- feat(ui): P5 特色页——记忆星座图、工作流金环脉冲、空状态星轨插画
- feat(ui): P4 动效——按钮/卡片/弹窗/页面切换过渡统一
- feat(ui): P3 布局——侧边栏分组与金色选中态、页头瘦身、对话页细节
- feat(ui): P2 品牌资产——新 favicon、BrandLogo 组件、启动屏与防闪烁底色
- feat(ui): P1 token 换血——星金品牌色 + 暖调中性色 + 圆角/阴影/动效 token
- chore: ignore Vesper local data
- test: rename Vesper test storage fixtures
- refactor: remove legacy data migration paths
- feat: migrate product storage to Vesper
- fix: tolerate sessions before history file creation
- feat: paginate session message history
- feat: complete P2 performance and interaction improvements
- fix: add theme switching and tokenise UI colors
- feat: improve accessibility and design consistency
- fix: replace Kimi provider with Kimi Code
- feat: add Kimi and GLM model providers
- style: refine permission mode picker
- style: move chat input to composer top
- style: increase chat composer height
- feat: add per-session tool permission modes
- feat: add local agent memory runtime
- fix: use utf-8 for Windows bash tools
- fix: preserve active chats across navigation and refresh
- feat: add interval schedules and full timezone support
- fix: restore scheduled tasks side-by-side layout
- fix: preserve scheduled tasks page design
- feat: implement scheduled agent tasks and notifications
- feat: add notification settings to config page
- refactor: route notifications to latest channel conversation
- feat: add WeChat channel and notification templates
- feat: replace notification channels with Feishu bidirectional gateway
- feat: establish app baseline with functional channels
